case_title: ALIGN TECHNOLOG, INC. VS. ALFRED D. DENNIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAVID J. COOK, ESQ. IN SUPPORT OF MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER, AND UNDER CCP SECTION 1008 (TRANSACTION ID # 100075832) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOG, INC. A CORPORATION
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-23-2019 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOG, INC.'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF'S POST-JUDGMENT MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT OF RIGHTS, RESTRAINING ORDER AND TURNOVER ORDER IS UNOPPOSED AND GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. THE ORDER SHALL BE SERVED BY PLAINTIFF WITH NOTICE OF ENTRY. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED (302/JPT)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order
Off Calendar Jul-23-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES: Atty. RYAN L. DAHM, ESQ. of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC (Tel: 415-989-4730) appearing for plaintiff Align Technologies, Inc.;
No other appearances made in this matter.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOG, INC.'S Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order.

Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter submitted without argument. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Plaintiff's post-judgment Motion for Assignment of Rights, Restraining Order and Turnover Order is unopposed and granted.

Order signed in open court. The Order shall be served by plaintiff with Notice of Entry.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2019 Off Calendar
